word: G222 - Ἀλεξανδρῖνος - Alexandrînos - al-ex-an-dree'-nos - Of Alexandria

sections.paragraph:
- Original: Ἀλεξανδρίνος

- Transliteration: Alexandrinos

- Phonetic: al-ex-an-dree'-nos

- Definition:

1. a native or resident of Alexandria in Egypt

2. of Alexandria or belonging to Alexandria

- Origin: from the same as G221

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From the same as G221; Alexandrine or belonging to Alexandria: - of Alexandria.
